visual_description: Two men in dark suits walk toward a parked Rolls-Royce on a wet, nighttime city street illuminated by streetlights and building lights. One carries a briefcase, and both move with purpose toward the car, their faces partially visible under the ambient glow. The scene is urban and cinematic, with reflections on the wet pavement and a backdrop of tall buildings.
audio_description: The audio features a single, high-pitched, and breathy voice with a slow pace, accompanied by a noticeable gasp at the beginning.
